# FOG Technologies

FOG Technologies (Future of Gaming) is a premier manufacturer and provider of immersive family entertainment center (FEC) attractions. We engineer high-ROI gaming experiences that blend physical activity with cutting-edge technology.

## What We Do
We specialize in creating "anchor attractions" that drive repeat footfall and high revenue per square foot for entertainment venues globally. Our products are operational in over 10 countries across 3 continents.

## Our Products

### HyperGrid
A modular, grid-based gaming floor where the floor itself is the controller. Players jump on pressure-sensitive LED tiles to complete various game modes like "Escape the Lava" and "Sharp Shooter".

### Laser Tag
A next-generation laser combat system featuring high-precision tracking, haptic feedback vests, and immersive arena designs.

### Laser Spy
A stealth-based laser maze challenge where players must navigate through a web of laser beams without breaking them, testing their agility and precision.

### Moments AI
Our proprietary AI system that automatically captures, scores, and delivers high-quality video highlights of players' best moments directly to their phones, driving organic social media exposure for operators.
